data.description:
## Context
ticket-link.sh line 418 has: `blocks|depends_on|relates_to) ;;` which validates the relation value. _graph.py lines 181-183 exempts `relates_to` from cycle detection. Both need to be updated for the new relation values.

## What to do

### 1. Update `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-link.sh` (line 418)
Change:
```bash
blocks|depends_on|relates_to) ;;
```
To:
```bash
blocks|depends_on|relates_to|duplicates|supersedes) ;;
```

Also update the usage/help text at line 28:
```bash
echo "  relation: blocks | depends_on | relates_to | duplicates | supersedes" >&2
```
And line 422/426 error message.

### 2. Ensure duplicates/supersedes are NOT bidirectional (unlike relates_to)
In ticket-link.sh, the `if [ "$relation" = "relates_to" ]` at line ~438 writes a reciprocal LINK. `duplicates` and `supersedes` should NOT be reciprocal. No change needed if the logic is `= "relates_to"` â€” but verify this explicitly.

### 3. Update `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_graph/_graph.py` (lines ~180-183)
The `would_create_cycle()` function exempts `relates_to` from cycle detection. Add `duplicates` and `supersedes` to the exemption (they are non-blocking semantic markers):
```python
if relation in ("relates_to", "duplicates", "supersedes"):
    return False
```
Also ensure the `_BLOCKING_RELATIONS` frozenset in `_status.py` does NOT include `duplicates` or `supersedes` (verify it only has `blocks` and `depends_on`).

## Files to modify
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-link.sh` â€” add to case statement + update help text + update error message
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_graph/_graph.py` â€” update would_create_cycle exemption

## Acceptance criteria
- `ticket link <src> <tgt> duplicates` exits 0 and writes LINK event (T1 tests pass)
- `ticket link <src> <tgt> supersedes` exits 0 and writes LINK event
- `duplicates` and `supersedes` links are NOT bidirectional
- Cycle detection does not fire for duplicates/supersedes chains
- All 6 tests from T1 (0552-ecac) pass after these changes
- Existing tests for blocks/depends_on/relates_to all pass (non-breaking)

## Depends on
T1 (0552-ecac)

## Testing mode
UPDATE â€” extending relation enum (additive, non-breaking)
data.title: Add duplicates and supersedes to allowed relations in ticket-link.sh and _graph.py
